summary: Iteration 84: Tested LaunchPath Sales Page at /program route. Backend POST /api/create-program-checkout verified working. All 4 CTAs tested. Hero scroll, navigation links all working.
action_items: Minor code quality: CTAButton component ignores passed data-testid prop — it auto-generates testid from children text. Explicit data-testid props like 'authorize-full-system-btn', 'request-phased-auth-btn', 'final-authorize-full-btn', 'final-phased-auth-btn' are silently dropped. Actual testids are 'cta-btn-authorize-full-syste', 'cta-btn-request-phased-autho'. Consider updating CTAButton to accept and forward data-testid prop.
critical_code_review_comments: CTAButton component destructures only {children, primary, onClick, style, disabled} — any extra props like data-testid passed to it are silently lost. The explicit data-testid attributes coded on the button usages (authorize-full-system-btn, request-phased-auth-btn, etc.) are not applied to the DOM.

test_details.GET /program: PASS — page renders with correct heading 'Your Authority Is Active.' and sticky nav 'LAUNCHPATH TRANSPORTATION EDU'
test_details.No global Navbar: PASS — only page's own sticky nav present
test_details.AUTHORIZE FULL SYSTEM buttons: PASS — 3 buttons found (HowItWorks, AuthorizationPaths, FinalCTA), all visible and enabled

context_for_next_testing_agent: LaunchPath Sales Page (/program) fully tested and working. Backend /api/create-program-checkout returns real Stripe checkout URL. All 4 CTAs wired correctly. Note: CTAButton ignores explicit data-testid props — actual testids are auto-generated from button text (e.g., 'cta-btn-authorize-full-syste', 'cta-btn-request-phased-autho').
